query: Find 10 parcels larger than 5000 m² in Drammen municipality, sorted by parcel area descending.

2.description: select top 10 parcels in Drammen with area > 5000 m², sorted by area desc

executions.sql: SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%drammen%';

SELECT teigid, matrikkelnummertekst, lagretberegnetareal, kommunenummer FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig WHERE kommunenummer = '3301' AND COALESCE(lagretberegnetareal, ST_Area(ST_Transform(omrade, 25833))) > 5000 ORDER BY COALESCE(lagretberegnetareal, ST_Area(ST_Transform(omrade, 25833))) DESC LIMIT 10;
